title: Slovakian-Style Stir Fry with Fermented Bread
description: A fusion of Indian and Slovakian flavors, this stir fry features tender meat and fermented bread. A unique and delicious twist on a classic dish.
instructions: Cut the Slovakian bread into small cubes and set aside.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the tender beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
Add the fermented vegetable to the skillet and cook until slightly caramelized, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the Indian spices to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the cooked beef back to the skillet and stir to combine with the fermented vegetable and spices.
Add the cubed bread to the skillet and stir to combine with the beef and vegetables.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
